7.8 1250pm AlertRivCo: Volcano Fire Evacuation Order downgraded to EVACUATION WARNING. Except for the Volcano Fire Perimeter, will remain an Order. Residents may return but should remain ready to evacuate if conditions change. Shelter Chaparral High School, 27215 Nicolas Rd.
